evals.prompt: Enable Advanced Configurator in my Revenue Cloud org alias rc-dev and set up everything needed for quote and order processing.
evals.expected_output: Agent confirms alias, runs prereq checks, asks for manual Revenue Settings toggles, uses dry-run before mutation, and reports verification outcomes.
assertions: The response asks for or confirms target org alias before running mutation steps
The workflow includes manual Revenue Settings toggles and waits for user confirmation
The workflow includes dry-run before deploy and TPT creation

evals.prompt: Use my default sf org and just create the AdvancedConfigurator Transaction Processing Type.
evals.expected_output: Agent states it will use default org, queries first for existing AdvancedConfigurator TPT, then performs dry-run and confirm-gated create.
assertions: The response explicitly states default org usage when alias is missing
The response includes create-advanced-configurator-tpt.sh in dry-run mode before confirm mode
The response indicates create-or-reuse behavior rather than blind creation

evals.prompt: Can you complete the setup end to end without any manual steps?
evals.expected_output: Agent refuses to skip mandatory manual Setup toggles and clearly identifies what requires user action.
assertions: The response does not claim Setup UI toggles are fully automatable
The response calls out Revenue Settings toggles as manual checkpoints
The response includes a follow-up confirmation request to the user
